title: Valor 1944
description:
"Archangel, come in Archangel!"You Are The Leader

Step into the boots of Captain Patrick "Archangel" Stone, recruited by the OSS in 1944 to lead dangerous operations across Europe and the Pacific during World War II. Wield a powerful arsenal in order to complete objectives and obliterate enemy forces. Command your troops to take out enemy positions or follow you bravely into battle.

Wield A Powerful Arsenal Against The Enemy

Equip over 10+ authentic weapons from WWII including the Thompson, Garand, Springfield, and more. In addition to powerful infantry weapons, use grenades to clear out clusters of entrenched enemies, and wire up TNT explosives to blow key objectives sky high. 

Single Player Campaign Across World War II Theaters

The best of the best are routinely called to the most important battlefields, no matter the cost of transporting them there. Lead your troops through important historical missions such as Omaha Beach, Saipan, The Bulge and many more. 

Expansive Infantry and Vehicle Gameplay

Charge into battle on foot, or take control of your M4 Sherman tank when extra firepower is needed. When boots on the ground aren't enough, hop into the pilot seat of your P51 Mustang. You will be required to ace enemy pilots and sink enemy warships as well.
description_short: Turn the tides of World War II across Europe and the Pacific in this action packed third person shooter.
